title: astragalus guatemalensis var. lozani
intro: Astragalus guatemalensis var. lozani, also known as Lozano's milkvetch, is a type of legume plant that belongs to the Fabaceae family. It is native to Guatemala and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing blood pressure, improving immune function, and supporting cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, Astragalus guatemalensis var. lozani is often used in teas, capsules, and tinctures, and is typically consumed in small amounts to support overall well-being.
